description_long: This is a standard 330ml aluminum beverage can, predominantly red in color with white branding and text. The can features the iconic Coca-Cola logo in bold white script, along with additional product information and nutritional facts printed on the side. The top of the can is metallic silver with a typical pull-tab opening mechanism. The surface appears smooth and slightly glossy, reflecting light subtly. The can is cylindrical with a slightly tapered top and bottom, and no visible signs of damage or deformation. The branding and text are clearly legible, and the can is fully opaque, revealing no contents inside.
description: A red Coca-Cola aluminum can with white branding, a silver pull-tab top, and smooth, glossy surface. The can is cylindrical and features clear product labeling.
description_view_0: The back side of the can, showing nutritional information, barcode, and part of the Coca-Cola logo.
description_view_1: A partial side view, revealing the edge of the Coca-Cola logo and the phrase 'SABOR ORIGINAL' near the top.
description_view_2: The front of the can, prominently displaying the Coca-Cola logo and 'SABOR ORIGINAL' text.
description_view_3: A side view showing the transition between the logo and the nutritional information, with both elements partially visible.
attribute_label_or_branding: White Coca-Cola logo in script, 'SABOR ORIGINAL' text, nutritional information, barcode, and product details in white on a red background.
